_readme: Flat key -> full <svg> string map. Keys are lowercase, hyphenated slugs. The site fetches this file and merges it over its built-in fallback set, so any key you add/replace here shows up automatically in nav icons, card socials, filter chips, the card skill badge, and per-skill icons inside student profile cards. Replace this file with your own version using the SAME key names to restyle everything at once. (v2 — refreshed, cohesive 1.7px stroke system with soft corners + subtle accent details.)
